case_title: URIBES ABREGO ORELLANA VS. DAO FU FENG et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY ORELLANA, URIBES ABREGO AS TO DEFENDANT FENG, DAO FU PHUNG, ANH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ANH PHUNG BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-19-2008 AT 8:30AM.
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-01-2010
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2008 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE. UNABLE TO SERVE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65.00) SERVED FEB-24-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FENG, DAO FU

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-19-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER KASIE CHEUNG PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORELLANA, URIBES ABREGO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FENG, DAO FU $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,640.00, DEFENDANT FENG APPEARED PERSONALLY AND WAIVES TIMELY SERVICE OF PROCESS. DEFENDANT PHUNG DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE- NO SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF ORELLANA, URIBES ABREGO ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
